creator: abij@tuta.io
text:
Hello,

On my freebsd desktop 

$ unama -a
FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p3 #0: Thu Sep  6 07:14:16 UTC 2018     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

colord won't start. I ran the command with verbose then got 

$ /usr/local/libexec/colord --verbose
13:18:11	Verbose debugging enabled (on console 1)
13:18:11	CdMappingDb: trying to open database '/var/db/colord/mapping.db'
13:18:11	CdMain: failed to load mapping database: Can't open database: unable to open database file

There is nothing in '/var/db/colord/' except a folder 'icc'. Would you be able to have a look at it? 

Thanks.
